title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. pseudoramosum
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. pseudoramosum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. Traditionally, Hawkweed is prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment.
